metadata.title: Online Image Splitter — Free, Instant & Precise | ImgSplit
metadata.description: Free online image splitter — drag split lines, snap to grid, and download pieces instantly. No upload needed, 100% browser-based. Desktop & mobile.

hero.description: Free online image splitter with drag-and-drop split lines, snap alignment, and pixel-perfect precision. No upload needed — everything runs in your browser.

benefits.subtitle: Skip the bloated image editors — split images the simple way.
benefits.noPsDesc: No need to install Photoshop or learn complicated slicing tools. Just drag split lines and cut — anyone can do it.
benefits.privacyDesc: Contracts, IDs, design files — no need to upload to third-party servers. All processing happens locally in your browser.
benefits.batchDesc: Add multiple horizontal and vertical split lines at once, auto-generate grids, and download all pieces in one go.
benefits.crossPlatformDesc: No installation needed. Open your browser and go — phone, tablet, or desktop.

features.preciseDesc: Drag split lines freely with snap alignment for pixel-perfect precision.
features.privacyDesc: All processing happens in your browser. Images are never uploaded to any server.
features.downloadDesc: Download all split images as a ZIP, or save individual pieces one by one.
features.gridDesc: Add horizontal and vertical lines at once to create even grids for batch cropping.
features.formatDesc: Supports PNG, JPG/JPEG, and WebP. Up to 20MB per file.
features.previewDesc: See split results in real-time as you adjust line positions.

steps.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to upload your image. Supports PNG, JPG, and WebP.
steps.step2Desc: Add horizontal or vertical split lines and drag them into position with snap alignment.
steps.step3Desc: See each split region in real-time and verify the results.
steps.step4Desc: Download all pieces as a ZIP, or save specific regions individually.

useCases.ecommerceDesc: Split long product images into sections for different display areas — faster page loads, better user experience.
useCases.designerDesc: Quickly export design slices without opening Photoshop — deliver assets right in your browser.
useCases.socialDesc: Split panoramas or long images into multiple tiles for grid-style posts that look professional.

comparison.subtitle: See how ImgSplit stacks up against traditional image editing tools.
comparison.feature1Desc: ImgSplit runs entirely in your browser — no downloads, no installations, no server uploads. Your images stay on your device at all times, ensuring complete privacy. Traditional tools like Photoshop require expensive subscriptions and heavy desktop software.
comparison.feature2Desc: Drag split lines with snap alignment for exact pixel positioning. Unlike basic online croppers that only let you select a single region, ImgSplit divides the entire image into multiple pieces simultaneously — preserving every pixel.
comparison.feature3Desc: Upload PNG, JPG, or WebP images and download your split pieces in the same high-quality format. Each piece retains the original resolution with zero compression artifacts — what you see is exactly what you get.
comparison.feature4Desc: Works on any modern browser — Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge. Split images on your desktop, tablet, or phone with the same full-featured experience. No app store downloads needed.
comparison.feature5Desc: Whether you are an e-commerce seller splitting product photos, a designer slicing mockups, a social media manager creating grid posts, or a student preparing presentation materials — ImgSplit adapts to your workflow. Add up to 20 horizontal and 20 vertical lines to create any layout you need.
comparison.feature6Desc: ImgSplit is open-source software published on GitHub. Anyone can inspect the code, verify our privacy claims, and contribute improvements. No hidden tracking, no data collection, no surprises.

cta.description: No sign-up. No installation. Just open your browser and go. Your image data is always protected.

faq.subtitle: Common questions about the image splitting tool
faq.a1: PNG, JPG/JPEG, and WebP images are supported, with a maximum file size of 20MB.
faq.q2: Will image quality be reduced after splitting?
faq.a2: No. The tool crops at the original resolution — no compression, no scaling, no quality loss.
faq.a3: Absolutely. All processing happens locally in your browser. No image data is ever uploaded to a server. Everything is cleared when you close the page.
faq.q4: How many split lines can I add?
faq.a4: Up to 20 horizontal and 20 vertical lines, allowing for very fine grid splits.
faq.q5: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a5: No. No registration, no login required. Open the page and start using it — completely free.
faq.a6: Yes — it works great on phones and tablets too.

metadata.title: Free Online Image Grid Splitter | ImgSplit
metadata.description: Split images into 3×3, 1×3, or 2×2 grids for Instagram, Facebook, and social media. Free, private, browser-based.

editor.dragHint: Drag to move · Slider to zoom
editor.pinchHint: Drag to move · Pinch to zoom

download.tapToSave: Tap an image to save individually

hero.description: Split images into 3×3, 1×3, or 2×2 grids for Instagram, Facebook, and other social platforms. Free, private, browser-based.

types.3x3Desc: Classic nine-grid layout for Instagram and social media profiles — turn one image into 9 stunning tiles.
types.1x3Desc: Horizontal triptych for panoramic shots and wide-format social posts.
types.2x2Desc: Clean four-panel layout — perfect for product showcases and comparison grids.

howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to upload your image.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Choose grid type, drag to reposition, and preview the result in real-time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Download all grid tiles as a ZIP, or save them individually.

faq.subtitle: Common questions about the grid splitting tool
faq.a1: Three grid types: 3×3 (nine-grid), 1×3 (horizontal triptych), and 2×2 (four-panel). Each is optimized for common social media formats.
faq.q2: Can I adjust the crop position?
faq.a2: Yes. After uploading, drag the image to reposition it within the grid frame, and use the scroll wheel to zoom in or out.
faq.q3: Can I add white borders between tiles?
faq.a3: Yes — toggle the "White Border" option in the editor to add clean spacing between grid tiles.
faq.a4: Absolutely. All processing happens locally in your browser. No image data is ever uploaded to a server.

cta.description: No sign-up. No installation. Upload your image and get perfect grid tiles in seconds.

metadata.title: About ImgSplit — Free Online Image Splitting Tool
metadata.description: Learn about ImgSplit — a free, open-source, browser-based image splitting tool built by ZooHero. Privacy-first, no upload needed.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: ImgSplit was built to solve a simple problem: splitting images shouldn't require expensive software or uploading files to unknown servers. We believe image editing tools should be free, private, and accessible to everyone.
mission.highlight: Every image you process stays on your device — always.

creator.title: Built by
creator.name: ZooHero
creator.bio: Full-stack developer passionate about building free, privacy-first web tools. ImgSplit is open source and built with Next.js, React, and the Canvas API.

tech.title: How It Works
tech.description: ImgSplit runs entirely in your browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. When you split an image, the processing happens locally on your device — no server round-trips, no uploads, no data collection. This architecture ensures zero latency, complete privacy, and works offline after the initial page load.

items.browserDesc: All image processing uses the HTML5 Canvas API. Your images never leave your device.
items.opensourceDesc: Full source code available on GitHub. Inspect, contribute, or fork — it's all transparent.
items.privacyDesc: No cookies tracking you, no analytics on your images, no server-side processing. Period.
items.freeDesc: No paywalls, no premium tiers, no signup required. ImgSplit will always be free.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have questions, feedback, or feature requests?

metadata.title: Privacy Policy — ImgSplit
metadata.description: ImgSplit privacy policy. All image processing happens in your browser. No images are uploaded or stored on any server.

privacy.intro: ImgSplit is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle your data — the short version is: we don't collect your images, and we never will.

processing.title: Image Processing
processing.content: All image processing happens entirely in your browser using the HTML5 Canvas API. Your images are never uploaded to our servers or any third-party service. When you close the browser tab, all image data is cleared from memory.

collection.title: Data We Collect
collection.content: We collect minimal, anonymous usage analytics to improve the tool:

items.analytics: Page views and general usage patterns via Vercel Analytics (no personal data)
items.errors: Anonymous error reports via Sentry to fix bugs (no image data included)
items.locale: Your language preference stored locally in a cookie

noItems.images: Your images or any image data

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use a single functional cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) to remember your language preference. No tracking cookies, no advertising cookies, no third-party cookies.

items.vercel: Vercel — hosting and anonymous page view analytics
items.sentry: Sentry — anonymous error monitoring (no image data)

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: ImgSplit does not knowingly collect any personal data from anyone, including children under 13.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy occasionally. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: Questions about this privacy policy? Email us at

metadata.title: Terms of Service — ImgSplit
metadata.description: ImgSplit terms of service. Free to use, no warranty, your images stay yours.

terms.intro: By using ImgSplit, you agree to these terms. They're simple and fair — we want you to use the tool freely and safely.

use.title: Use of Service
use.content: ImgSplit is a free online image splitting tool. You may use it for any lawful purpose — personal, commercial, or educational. No account or registration is required.

ip.title: Your Content
ip.content: Your images are yours. Since all processing happens in your browser, we never have access to your images. We claim no rights over any content you process using ImgSplit.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: ImgSplit is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do our best to ensure the tool works correctly, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, ImgSplit and its creators shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use this service.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.content: ImgSplit is open-source software licensed under the MIT License. The source code is available on GitHub.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these terms occasionally. Continued use of ImgSplit after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: Questions about these terms? Email us at

footer.tagline: Online Image Splitting Tool — Free · Secure · Fast
